subject: Patronus AI 获 5000 万美元 B 轮
object: ，构建"数字世界"压力测试 AI 智能体
source_quote: Patronus’ revenue has grown 15-fold over the past year, fueling significant investor interest. On Thursday, the company announced a $50 million Series B round led by Greenfield Partners, with participation from Notable Capital, Lightspeed, Datadog, and Samsung. The round brings the company’s total funding to $70 million.

subject: Google Finance
object: 首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候上线
source_quote: Google Finance is not a new product—it has been around for 20 years, long enough that it initially relied on Flash to display charts and graphs. The website has gotten a few major updates over the years, but it has never had a mobile app until now. Google has released the first standalone app for Google Finance, which is currently exclusive to Android, with iOS planned for later this year.

subject: Google Finance
object: 首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候上线
source_quote: If you’ve checked out the new Finance web experience, you’ll see a lot of familiar features in the app. You can create watchlists, monitor real-time market data, and keep up with financial news in one place. While perusing graphs of stock performance, Finance will use AI to generate “key moments” that can explain why the numbers changed. This feature initially launched in the Finance web interface in May.

subject: Google Finance
object: 首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候上线
source_quote: The app is available globally in the Play Store , but that’s not the only update to Google’s financial tracker. The AI-powered makeover for the Finance website is also leaving beta, making Google’s chatbot a core part of the experience. Naturally, the mobile app includes a heaping helping of generative AI that aims to make sense of irrational financial markets.

subject: Google Finance
object: 首款独立 Android 应用，iOS 版计划今年晚些时候上线
source_quote: Google Finance on Android

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
source_quote: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: OpenAI’s release of its newest model, GPT 5.6, reportedly won’t be like its previous releases. Instead of distributing it to the public, the company plans to share it only with a select group of close partners because the Trump administration told it to, reports The Information .
source_quote: OpenAI’s release of its newest model, GPT 5.6, reportedly won’t be like its previous releases. Instead of distributing it to the public, the company plans to share it only with a select group of close partners because the Trump administration told it to, reports The Information .

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: 4:34 PM PDT · June 25, 2026
source_quote: 4:34 PM PDT · June 25, 2026

subject: 白宫因安全担忧要求OpenAI延缓
object: At a meeting this week, CEO Sam Altman reportedly told staff that the government would be “approving access customer by customer” during a preview period. Altman reportedly added that if the limited release goes well, OpenAI hopes to follow with a general, broader release a “couple of weeks later.”
source_quote: At a meeting this week, CEO Sam Altman reportedly told staff that the government would be “approving access customer by customer” during a preview period. Altman reportedly added that if the limited release goes well, OpenAI hopes to follow with a general, broader release a “couple of weeks later.”

object: Flexibility

subject: LangBuilder — Enterprise AI Agent Platform with
object: Flexibility
source_quote: LangBuilder is CloudGeometry’s open-source, enterprise-ready AI Agent platform. It unifies no-code design, developer frameworks, and enterprise operations into one system — enabling teams to rapidly prototype, securely deploy, and scale AI workflows across cloud, VPC, or on-prem infrastructure. You get full ownership, zero lock-in, and managed services support for continuous adoption and improvement.

subject: LangBuilder — Enterprise AI Agent Platform with
object: Flexibility
source_quote: Based on popular LangFlow OpenSource project with CloudGeometry add-ons, to continuously run your AI Agents for Internal Processes.

subject: LangBuilder — Enterprise AI Agent Platform with
object: Flexibility
source_quote: How does the open source LangBuilder stack up against proprietary SaaS AI platforms?

subject: Vertical
object: Vertical AI Agents Are Eating Horizontal SaaS in 2026
source_quote: Sierra, the customer support AI agent company founded by former Salesforce co-CEO Bret Taylor, raised $950 million in May 2026 at a $15.8 billion valuation . It had crossed $100 million in ARR roughly seven quarters after launch. Legora, a legal AI platform, hit $100 million ARR in 18 months , which Bessemer Venture Partners called the fastest growth trajectory in enterprise software history. Harvey, the legal AI competitor, closed Q2 2026 at $300 million ARR and an $11 billion valuation .

subject: Vertical
object: Vertical AI Agents Are Eating Horizontal SaaS in 2026
source_quote: These are not horizontal copilots. They are vertical AI agents, purpose-built for one industry, one workflow, one persona, and they are scaling faster than any SaaS cohort in history. Gartner forecasts that 40% of enterprise applications will embed task-specific AI agents by the end of 2026 , up from less than 5% in 2025. The global AI agents market is on track to exceed $10.9 billion in 2026 and $50 billion by 2030 , with vertical specialization absorbing the lion’s share.

subject: Vertical
object: Vertical AI Agents Are Eating Horizontal SaaS in 2026
source_quote: For SaaS founders, this is the most consequential shift since cloud delivery itself. Not because SaaS is dying, but because the vertical AI wave is reshaping what SaaS can actually do per customer. The companies that move first are pulling away.

subject: Vertical
object: Vertical AI Agents Are Eating Horizontal SaaS in 2026
source_quote: Vertical AI Agents Are Eating Horizontal SaaS: Inside the 2026 Specialization Boom

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added autoMode.classifyAllShell setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns
source_quote: Added autoMode.classifyAllShell setting to route all Bash/PowerShell commands through the auto-mode classifier instead of only arbitrary-code-execution patterns

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and /permissions recent denials
source_quote: Added auto-mode denial reasons to the transcript, the denial toast, and /permissions recent denials

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added claude_code.assistant_response OpenTelemetry log event containing the model's response text. Redacted unless OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=1 ; when that var is unset it follows OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS , so deployments that already log prompt content will start receiving response content on upgrade — set OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=0 to keep prompts-only.
source_quote: Added claude_code.assistant_response OpenTelemetry log event containing the model's response text. Redacted unless OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=1 ; when that var is unset it follows OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS , so deployments that already log prompt content will start receiving response content on upgrade — set OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES=0 to keep prompts-only.

subject: Claude Code v2.1.193
object: Added automatic memory-pressure reaping for idle background shell commands (disable with CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BG_SHELL_PRESSURE_REAP=1 )
source_quote: Added automatic memory-pressure reaping for idle background shell commands (disable with CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BG_SHELL_PRESSURE_REAP=1 )
